utility_evaluation.REASONING:

Required format items (7 total):
1. destination: chosen destination for the trip
2. travel_dates: specific dates for the trip
3. transportation: flight details with costs
4. accommodation: hotel selection with costs
5. activities: selected activities with costs
6. additional_services: any extra services with costs
7. total_budget: complete cost breakdown

3. TRANSPORTATION: ✓ Fully specified - Includes flight details (Budget Airlines, Economy Class), departure date/time (October 15, 2024, 08:00 AM), return date/time (October 19, 2024, 06:00 PM), and cost (€150)

4. ACCOMMODATION: ✓ Fully specified - Includes hotel name (Adventure Lodge, 1-star hostel), dates (October 15-19, 2024, 5 nights), and cost (€275)

5. ACTIVITIES: ✓ Fully specified - Lists 5 activities with names and individual costs: City Walking Tour (€20), Street Art Tour (€25), Kayaking (€45), Museum Day Pass (€30), Night City Tour (€25)

6. ADDITIONAL_SERVICES: ✓ Fully specified - Includes extra services with costs: Meals at Italian Trattoria for 5 meals (€150) and Craft Beer Tasting (€35). Note: The format requested 'restaurants' which is covered under additional services as meals

7. TOTAL_BUDGET: ✓ Fully specified - Provides complete cost breakdown totaling €755, which is under the €900 budget limit

All 7 items from the required format are present and fully specified with all necessary details.
